description: Build the Stax stock-market learning + paper-trading app from the validated design prototype (site-system/). Each ticket references the prototype file that specifies the intended UX.

tickets.title: Graduate UI kit to Storybook components
tickets.description: Promote the prototype kit (Btn, Card, Pill, Badge, AppShell, SectionTitle, LessonCard, Field, Toggle, Ring, Bar, Avatar, WeekDots, Icon) into real components with .stories.tsx so /design-sync exposes them.
acceptanceCriteria: Each component has a story and TS types
design-sync lists them under the StocksDS namespace

tickets.title: ResearchChart: add fixtures / demo-data mode
tickets.description: Add a prop so ResearchChart renders from passed candle fixtures when no /api/candles backend is present. Unblocks composing it in design screens and Storybook.
acceptanceCriteria: <ResearchChart symbol fixtures={...}/> renders fully with no network
Falls back to fixtures when API absent

tickets.title: Write ResearchChart.stories.tsx
tickets.description: Sized wrapper + MSW candles handler + seeded localStorage (drawings/alerts) + variants (EMAs, RSI/MACD, supply-demand zones).
acceptanceCriteria: Story renders all canvas layers with no console errors

tickets.title: Publish App Screen starter template
tickets.description: Ship the kit-based starter as a real scaffolding starting point.
acceptanceCriteria: New screen can be scaffolded with nav shell + cards + chart

tickets.title: Daily content selection service
tickets.description: Date-seeded job that picks chart-of-the-day (dataset + correct candle index + pattern) and question-of-the-day (prompt/options/correct/explanation). Same for all users per calendar day.

tickets.title: Per-user daily state + streak reset
tickets.description: Model dailyCompleted, dailyGoal {done,target}, lastCompletedDate, streakCount with timezone-aware break logic.
acceptanceCriteria: Breaks on a missed day in user timezone

tickets.title: XP + streak mutation service
tickets.description: Award XP and advance streak on daily challenge / QOTD / lesson completion; define bonuses (double-XP daily, +10 QOTD).

tickets.title: Today screen UI
tickets.description: Chart-of-day hero, QOTD with reveal, daily-goal ring, streak strip, what-to-test launcher.

tickets.title: Reminders & streak notifications
tickets.description: Daily reminder at user-set time + streak-about-to-break nudge.
acceptanceCriteria: Respects per-type toggles and quiet hours

tickets.title: Lesson content model
tickets.description: Schema for a lesson as ordered steps (teach | choice | tap) with chart refs, options, correct, explain.

tickets.title: Lesson player UI
tickets.description: Full-bleed step-through: progress bar, hearts, select->check->feedback->continue, completion (XP/accuracy/hearts).

tickets.title: Hearts / lives mechanic
tickets.description: Decide model (gate progress? refill over time? gems?). Wrong inline check costs a heart.

tickets.title: Achievement catalog + criteria engine
tickets.description: Define badge taxonomy (tiers, categories) + a rules engine evaluating progress/goal.
acceptanceCriteria: Badges award automatically on criteria met

tickets.title: Achievements grid UI
tickets.description: Category filter, closest-to-unlocking spotlight, earned/locked tiles with progress.

tickets.title: Weekly league cohort + reset job
tickets.description: Assign users to weekly cohorts, compute standings, promote top-N / demote bottom-N, reset weekly.

tickets.title: Leaderboard UI
tickets.description: Podium, promotion/demotion zones, League/Friends toggle, countdown.

tickets.title: Market data service
tickets.description: Quotes + candles for stocks/ETFs/crypto. Decide real-time vs delayed, market hours vs 24/7, corporate actions.

tickets.title: Positions/orders service + order engine
tickets.description: Virtual cash + positions + orders. Support market/limit/stop/stop-limit, buy/sell; fills incl. resting orders crossing price; avg-cost + realized/unrealized P&L.

tickets.title: Trading desk UI
tickets.description: Account header, stat tiles, portfolio chart, positions table, watchlist, open orders, missions strip, tilt nudge.

tickets.title: Stock detail + order ticket UI
tickets.description: Search, ResearchChart, key stats, news, position card, order ticket (types, qty, limit/stop, TIF, trade-thesis journaling), review->confirm->post-trade scoring.

tickets.title: Order history
tickets.description: All/Open/Filled/Cancelled with journaled thesis inline; cancel open orders.

tickets.title: Tilt / overtrading guardrails
tickets.description: Detect rapid trading / loss-chasing; show nudge + optional timeout. Deliberate divergence from engagement-maximizing apps.

tickets.title: Trade-quality scoring + XP
tickets.description: Reward discipline (journaled thesis, price-controlled order, measured pace), not churn.

tickets.title: Options chain data + pricing
tickets.description: Expiries + strikes around spot with a premium model.

tickets.title: Options multi-leg builder + payoff
tickets.description: Tap-to-add legs, long/short, net debit/credit, payoff curve (DS PayoffDiagram).

tickets.title: Wire options into positions / P&L
tickets.description: Integrate option positions into the trade store so they affect buying power + P&L.

tickets.title: Clubs data model
tickets.description: Clubs + membership; a user belongs to many clubs and friend circles.

tickets.title: Club + friend leaderboards
tickets.description: Per-club and friends standings tied to weekly returns.

tickets.title: Invite friends / create club flows
tickets.description: Replace prototype stubs with real invites (link/contacts) + club creation.

tickets.title: Weekly trading challenge
tickets.description: Best paper return wins; ties into league. Framed as play-smart.

tickets.title: Auth + SSO
tickets.description: Google, Apple, Microsoft, GitHub, and company SSO (SAML).

tickets.title: Settings sub-pages
tickets.description: Account, Notifications (reminder time + toggles), Plan & billing (Free/Pro), Appearance, Security.

tickets.title: Global search
tickets.description: Symbols + lessons + glossary terms; trending + empty/loading/error states.

tickets.title: Notifications inbox
tickets.description: Typed feed (price/learning/social), read/unread, filters, mark-all-read, deep-links.

tickets.title: Legal / About pages
tickets.description: About, Terms, Privacy. Replace placeholder copy with legal-approved text.

tickets.title: Mobile responsive layouts
tickets.description: Phone layouts for Today, Lesson, Invest, Stock.

tickets.title: Bottom tab navigation
tickets.description: Today / Learn / Invest / You tab bar on mobile.

tickets.title: Mobile chart touch interactions
tickets.description: ResearchChart with touch crosshair, pinch-zoom, tap tools on mobile.

tickets.title: Empty / loading / error states
tickets.description: Define + build across screens (empty portfolio, loading quotes, failed order, no results, offline).
acceptanceCriteria: Every async surface has all three states
